description: Supported operations and SCIM API basic configuration.

schemas.description:
An array of URNs that identify the schema(s) that define the structure of this response.

In this case, it contains urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:ServiceProviderConfig, which indicates that this is a SCIM ServiceProviderConfig response.

documentationUri.description: A link to Miro SCIM documentation.

patch.description: Indicator of whether the PATCH operation is supported.

supported.description: Returns true if the operation is supported.

bulk.description: Indicator of whether the Bulk operation is supported.

supported.description: Returns true if the operation is supported.

maxOperations.description: Maximum operations supported in a single request.

maxPayloadSize.description: Maximum payload size supported for a single request.

filter.description: Indicator of whether the Filter operation is supported.

supported.description: Returns true if the operation is supported.

maxResults.description: Maximum results returned in a list response.

changePassword.description: Indicator of whether the Change Password operation is supported.

supported.description: Returns true if the operation is supported.

sort.description: Indicator of whether the Sort operation is supported.

supported.description: Returns true if the operation is supported.

etag.description: Indicator of whether ETag is supported.

supported.description: Returns true if ETag is supported.

authenticationSchemes.description: A list of supported authentication schemes.

specUri.description: Specification URI of the authentication scheme.

primary.description: Returns true if this is the primary authentication scheme of the service provider.
